title: Shipping Policy
content: Hubmicroo ships across Pakistan. Standard delivery takes 3-5 business days. Express delivery (1-2 days) is available in Karachi, Lahore, and Islamabad for an additional fee of PKR 200. Free shipping on orders above PKR 3,000. Orders placed before 2PM are dispatched same day. Tracking numbers are sent via SMS and email after dispatch.

title: Returns & Refund Policy
content: We accept returns within 7 days of delivery if the product is unused and in original packaging. Damaged or defective items are eligible for a free replacement or full refund within 14 days. To initiate a return, contact support at support@hubmicroo.com or WhatsApp 0300-1234567. Refunds are processed within 3-5 business days to the original payment method.

title: Warranty Policy
content: All Hubmicroo products carry a minimum 6-month manufacturer warranty. Electronics and accessories are covered for 1 year. Warranty covers manufacturing defects only — physical damage, water damage (unless rated waterproof), and misuse are excluded. Register your product within 30 days of purchase at hubmicroo.com/warranty to activate the extended warranty.

title: Payment Methods
content: We accept Cash on Delivery (COD) across Pakistan, JazzCash, EasyPaisa, bank transfer (HBL, MCB, UBL), and all major credit/debit cards via secure Stripe checkout. Installment plans (0% markup) are available on orders above PKR 10,000 through selected banks. All online transactions are SSL encrypted.

title: Contact & Support
content: Customer support is available Monday-Saturday 9AM-9PM. Email: support@hubmicroo.com | WhatsApp: 0300-1234567 | Phone: 021-34567890. For order tracking, use the tracking portal at hubmicroo.com/track. Average response time for email is under 4 hours during working hours.

title: General FAQ
content: Q: Are all products genuine? A: Yes, all products sold by Hubmicroo are 100% authentic with valid warranties. Q: Do you have a physical store? A: We are online-only but have a pickup point in Karachi. Q: Can I cancel an order? A: Orders can be cancelled within 1 hour of placing them. After dispatch, the return policy applies. Q: Do you offer bulk discounts? A: Yes, contact sales@hubmicroo.com for bulk pricing on orders of 10+ units.
